items.name: NFL Draft Chain
items.description: Commemorate the 2022 NFL Draft in style with your very own limited-edition blinged out NFL Chain. On sale ONLY from 5/2 to 5/3!

items.name: Clown Tie
items.description: Send in the clowns!

items.name: Gucci Queen Elizabeth Gorget x Achille Lauro (3.0)
items.description: Gorget detailed with a GG pattern that was worn on stage by Achille Lauro during the last night of Sanremo 2020 as he performed his song "Me ne frego." The item co-designed by Achille Lauro and Alessandro Michele pays homage to Queen Elizabeth Tudor I. Item creation supervised by Rook Vanguard. This is a collectible item. Item created for 3.0 avatars woman/man.

items.name: Ultimate Robling
items.description: People see this, and they just know.  When will this be on sale again? Check the Mayan calendar.

items.name: Circuit Tie
items.description: Looking like a chip off the old block.

items.description: Being Green keeps you warm... if not exactly fashionable.

items.name: Vans Checkerboard Era Necklace
items.description: The Vans Era, originally called the Vans #95, was brought to life in 1976 and made popular by the legendary Z-Boys of Santa Monica. Take yours wherever you go with the collectable Vans checkerboard era necklace.

items.name: Diamond Plated Tie
items.description: Real men wear diamond plate.

items.name: Tasteless Bow Tie

items.name: DNA Scarf

items.name: Monster Scarf

items.name: Dopamine Necklace

items.name: Firin' mai Tie!
items.description: Ima firin' mai Tie!  See that's funny because the tie looks like it's on fire.  Maybe it got hit with a laser?  Maybe you just stood too close to the campfire... Wait, why were you wearing a tie at a campfire.  Seems a bit too formal.

items.name: Paintball Tie
items.description: Why were you playing paintball in a suit and tie?
